title: Maltebrunia letestui
taxonomy: Maltebrunia letestui is a species of flowering plant in the family Strelitziaceae. The genus Maltebrunia is endemic to the Central African Republic. It belongs to the tribe Strelitzeae and is closely related to the genus Strelitzia. Within the family Strelitziaceae, Maltebrunia letestui is a part of the order Zingiberales. The exact classification of this plant may be subject to further research and updates.
